nasb.text: Now Gaal the son of Ebed came with his relatives, and crossed over into Shechem; and the men of Shechem put their trust in him.

esv.text: And Gaal the son of Ebed moved into Shechem with his relatives, and the leaders of Shechem put confidence in him.

cnv.text: 那時，以別的兒子迦勒與他的兄弟都來了，到示劍去，示劍人竟信任他。

ccb.text: 以别的儿子迦勒和他的弟兄来到示剑，示剑人都信任他们。
